name: Riya Shah
address: Science City Road, Sola, Ahmedabad, Gujarat - 380060
summary: Data Analyst with 2 years of experience in SQL-based reporting and Tableau visualization for logistics and supply chain clients. Solid Excel skills and growing Python proficiency. Detail-oriented with strong documentation habits. Seeking a challenging analytics role with greater scope for predictive analytics and ML model interpretation.

experience.title: Data Analyst
responsibilities: Developed 6 Tableau dashboards for 3 logistics clients tracking OTD (On-Time Delivery), fill rate, and warehouse utilization.
Wrote 40+ SQL queries in PostgreSQL for daily, weekly, and monthly KPI reports.
Analyzed 3 years of shipment data (800K rows) to identify dispatch delay root causes — recommendations implemented saving ₹12 Lakhs/month.
Automated daily report distribution using Python smtplib and Pandas report generation.
Conducted A/B test on packaging design impact on returns rate — 14% reduction confirmed.

experience.title: Business Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Created standardized Excel-based operational scorecards for a US utility client.
Performed data validation on SAP BI extracts against source databases.
Wrote BRDs for 2 reporting automation requests.

projects.name: Supply Chain KPI Dashboard
projects.description: Built a Tableau dashboard for logistics KPI monitoring — OTD, OTIF, pod-rate. Includes drill-down by region, carrier, and SKU. Published on Tableau Public.
